summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of intents, difficulties, ambiguities, and noise types, but lacks diversity in the style attribute, particularly in formal and verbose styles. There are also several near-duplicate phrasings and shallow paraphrases present.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more verbose and formal styles to enhance diversity.
Implement stricter checks for near-duplicate phrasings and shallow paraphrases.
Include edge cases and rare scenarios more frequently to enrich the dataset.
